title: tium howellii
intro: Tium howellii, also known as Howell's ginseng, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asclepiadaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tium howellii are said to include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and boosting the immune system. Tium howellii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and capsules, although its use and availability may be limited due to its rarity and limited scientific research.
